parsed.final_response: You're caught between the brand's expectation of a polished image and your own fear that if you don't look 'good,' people will doubt your capabilities. It's like you're trying to prove something to yourself and everyone else through this pursuit of perfection. That can be a really heavy burden to carry. Your self-doubt about your appearance is feeding into this cycle, making it even harder to break free.
